message:
chore: add ephemeral test binaries and beads recovery dirs to .gitignore

Ignore root-level Mach-O/ELF test binaries (test_abs, test_f64_min,
test_has_cycle, test_nan_min, test_path, test_preopen) that cargo test
sometimes leaves behind, and .beads/recovery_*/ directories that the
beads issue tracker creates during automatic recovery operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -134,5 +134,16 @@ fix_*.py
 parse_test
 parse_test.rs
 
+# Ephemeral test binaries (root-level Mach-O/ELF artifacts from cargo test)
+/test_abs
+/test_f64_min
+/test_has_cycle
+/test_nan_min
+/test_path
+/test_preopen
+
+# Beads recovery directories (auto-generated during issue tracker recovery)
+.beads/recovery_*/
+
 # FCP host runtime state (generated by tests and host binary)
 **/.fcp-host/
